title: Oritech - Clear Glass
body:
Simply makes Oritech glass texture clear.
![Image of all the modified blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baa54d7c991076a3430d03c3e7177a2fa8c1dc68.png)
This ressource pack was posted on CurseForge and Modrinth. Download from there if you want to support me.
